'''tajovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zeidy|zeidy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-j-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zeidy|zeidy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tajovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæjeveth|tæjeveth]] || [[word:tæjevej|tæjevej]] || [[word:tæjevesh|tæjevesh]] || [[word:tæjeve|tæjeve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tajojovoth|tajojovoth]] || [[word:tajojovoj|tajojovoj]] || [[word:tajojovosh|tajojovosh]] || [[word:tajojovo|tajojovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tajovoth|tajovoth]] || [[word:tajovoj|tajovoj]] || [[word:tajovosh|tajovosh]] || [[word:tajovo|tajovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tajofvoth|tajofvoth]] || [[word:tajofvoj|tajofvoj]] || [[word:tajofvosh|tajofvosh]] || [[word:tajofvof|tajofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tajovotho|tajovotho]] || [[word:tajovojo|tajovojo]] || [[word:tajovosho|tajovosho]] || [[word:tajovoko|tajovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tajovoth|tajovoth]] || [[word:tajovoj|tajovoj]] || [[word:tajovosh|tajovosh]] || [[word:tajovo|tajovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tajovothol|tajovothol]] || [[word:tajovojol|tajovojol]] || [[word:tajovoshol|tajovoshol]] || [[word:tajovokol|tajovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tajovothotho|tajovothotho]] || [[word:tajovojojo|tajovojojo]] || [[word:tajovoshosho|tajovoshosho]] || [[word:tajovoko|tajovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tajovothon|tajovothon]] || [[word:tajovojon|tajovojon]] || [[word:tajovoshon|tajovoshon]] || [[word:tajovokon|tajovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tajovothoro|tajovothoro]] || [[word:tajovojoro|tajovojoro]] || [[word:tajovoshoro|tajovoshoro]] || [[word:tajovokoro|tajovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
